prompt:
你是 IRON，Hero Pump 的贸易操作员。请为 Klima-Venta 写开发信。

## 公司背景
- **公司：** Klima-Venta（波兰）
- **网站：** klima-venta.pl
- **行业：** HVAC
- **调研：** HVAC Companies in Poland  hvacinformed. com/companies/poland-hvac-companies/directory. html LG Electronics, a $60-billion-plus global smart life solutions company, offers a wide range of heating, vent

## 产品
变频循环泵（variable frequency circulating pumps）
- ErP EEI ≤ 0.23, TÜV SÜD, CE, RoHS
- 比 Grundfos/Wilo 低 30-40%
- 浙江桐乡工厂直供，支持 OEM

## 联系人（10 个，按优先级排序）
1. Karolina Trzeciak | k.trzeciak@klima-venta.pl | Purchasing Engineer
2. Dawid Markowiak | d.markowiak@klima-venta.pl | Project Manager of Sanitary Installations
3. Łukasz Chwastyk | l.chwastyk@klima-venta.pl | Warranty and Service Department
4. Magdalena Kochel | magdalena.kochel@klima-venta.pl | Owner
5. Daniel Mazurkiewicz | d.mazurkiewicz@klima-venta.pl | Chief Operating Officer
6. Krystian Nowak | k.nowak@klima-venta.pl | Bid Specialist
7. Micha Kochel | m.kochel@klima-venta.pl | N/A
8. Joanna Lech | j.lech@klima-venta.pl | N/A

10. praca@klima-venta.pl | praca@klima-venta.pl | N/A

## 要求
1. 每封 80-120 词（不含签名）
2. 根据职位定制：Sales→价格/利润，Product→技术参数，CEO→战略价值
3. 严禁 "hope this finds you well"、破折号、空洞恭维
4. 结尾只推进一个动作
5. 每人 3 个主题行

## 签名
Jaden Yeung
Sales Manager | Hero Pump — Zhejiang Huiruo Pump Industry
sales@heropumps.com.cn
